rationale: Domestic nonprofit corporation name at top of form.

label_verbatim: I, ___ (followed by 'President / Treasurer / Clerk or Secretary' circle-title labels)
rationale: Printed name of the officer signing the application. Shape B (name only — title is captured by the user circling 'President', 'Treasurer', or 'Clerk or Secretary' to the right of the widget; that title selection is not bound to a widget). The (signature) line further to the right is wet-ink only and has no widget.

label_verbatim: ceased to carry on activities on (date) ___
rationale: Date the corporation ceased to carry on activities — the predicate fact for the excuse under §1301.5. Inline date blank within the certification paragraph.

label_verbatim: Name of entity(s) on the submitted filings [1]

widget_id: Name of entitys on the submitted filings 2
rationale: Cover-letter row 2 — typically blank on a single-entity excuse filing.

label_verbatim: Hold attested copy for pick up

rationale: Total fees ($5 base per page-0 header).

widget_id: Contact email address for this filing
label_verbatim: Contact email address for this filing

widget_id: Email address to use for annual report reminders
label_verbatim: Email address to use for annual report reminders
rationale: Annual-report reminder email — note: an *excused* corporation should not receive annual-report reminders, but the cover letter still captures this field as a generic SOS cover-letter primitive.
